rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>嗨嗨嗨！我还以为是谁呢……<unk[5:0]>
原来是当时救了我的小哥啊！
你穿过我做的依盖队紧身服了吗？<unk[5:0]>
做得很不错吧？
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>那时真是多谢你帮忙，
把被抓的我救了出来。
托你的福，我现在才能驰骋于大地，
在各地寻找<Color=red>时尚宝物<Color=white>，每天都过得很好！

<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>嘿！嘿！嘿！我還在想是誰呢……<unk[5:0]>

四處尋找<Color=red>時尚珍寶<Color=white>，每天都過得很快樂！

いい<Ruby={4:4}でき>出来だっただろ？

あんときは ほんとにありがとうな

<Ruby={2:4}おく>送れているのは ニイチャンのお<Ruby={2:4}かげ>陰だよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Hey, hey! I thought I recognized you!
<unk[5:0]>You're the superstar who got me out of
that jam with the Yiga Clan.
Oh, and how's the Yiga armor I tailored
treating you?<unk[5:0]> That was rhetorical. I made
it, so I know it's perfect.
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Seriously though. Thanks for setting me
free back there. I mean it.

Ever since, I've been running all over the
place, looking for <Color=red>fashion treasures<Color=white> and
having the time of my life. Cheers for that!

superstar who helped me out!
And man, you're even rockin' that Yiga

save back there. You are the GUY, guy.<PageBreak>Thanks to you, instead of rotting in a cell,
I'm running around, searching for <Color=red>stylish
treasure <Color=white>and having the time of my life.

rows.CNzh:
所以，我就破例告诉小哥你
<Color=red>宝物的秘密<Color=white>好了！
rows.TWzh:

把<Color=red>寶物的秘密<Color=white>告訴小哥！
rows.JPja:
だからニイチャンには <Ruby={4:8}とくべつ>特別に<Color=red>お<Ruby={2:6}たから>宝の<Ruby={4:6}ひみつ>秘密<Color=white>
<Ruby={2:4}おし>教えてやってもいいぜ！
rows.USen:
So I'm gonna share the love here and tell
you the <Color=red>secret treasure info <Color=white>I've got!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>嗨！<unk[5:0]>小哥！<PageBreak>既然你又来向我搭话了……

没问题、没问题～<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>嘿！<unk[5:0]>小哥！<PageBreak>你又來找我搭話……

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>话说回来，看你挺喜欢这条紧身服的，

原本是被依盖队胁迫，不情不愿做出来的东西，<unk[5:1]>
现在倒有些为它感到自豪了呢。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>看來你相當喜歡那件緊身服，
我感到相當高興喔。
雖然原本是被依蓋隊逼著製作的服裝，<unk[5:1]>
但現在總覺得有點為它自豪了呢。

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>大盗<Color=red>拉姆达<Color=white>在<Color=red>极寒之地冒险时<Color=white>仰仗的
流传至今的传说中的服装……
据说它就被匿藏在
这片<Color=red>海布拉地区<Color=white>。
<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>此话不可到处声张，
其中一件似乎就在<Color=red>西北方<Color=white>的<Color=red>乌克池塘的洞窟<Color=white>里……<unk[5:2]>
<Size=100><unk[3:0:263]>“不准你抢在我前面！”<unk[5:1]>
虽然我很想这么对你说，<Size=80>
<Size=100><unk[3:0:8]>但寻宝就是先到先得嘛。<unk[5:0]>
不管最终是谁得到了它，都不可以怨恨！<Size=80><Size=100>

這個<Color=red>海布拉地區<Color=white>。
<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>雖然不能大肆張揚……

<unk[3:0:263]>不准偷跑喔！<unk[5:1]>
我原本是想這樣講……
<unk[3:0:8]>但寶物本來就是誰先得到就屬於誰，<unk[5:0]>

って<Ruby={2:2}い>言いたいとこだけど<Size=80>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>According to fashion legend, the famous
bandit <Color=red>Misko<Color=white> had a signature outfit <Color=red>for
adventuring in freezing climes<Color=white>.
The rumors say the whole look is hidden
right here in <Color=red>Hebra<Color=white>!<PageBreak><Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>Just between us, I hear that one piece of the outfit
is in <Color=red>Lake Kilsie Cave <Color=white>to the <Color=red>northwest<Color=white>...<unk[5:1]><Size=100><PageBreak><unk[3:0:263]>I SWEAR, if you get there before me,
I'll... I'll...<unk[5:1]><PageBreak>Nah, I'm just kiddin', superstar.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:8]>It's treasure. <unk[5:0]>The finders-keepers rule is
in full effect. No hard feelings, either way!

rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>此话不可到处声张，<unk[5:0]>其实<Color=red>这山顶深处的
乌克池塘的洞窟<Color=white>里藏着<Color=red>拉姆达的宝物<Color=white>……<unk[5:1]>
而且我听利特族人说，
只有<Color=red>北侧<Color=white>的洞窟是在池塘里的……<Size=100>
<unk[3:0:10]>话虽如此……<Color=red><unk[5:1]>乌克池塘<Color=white>所在之处相当危险，
不仅没有道路，连野兽踏出的小道也找不到……
池塘周围更是断崖绝壁环绕……<unk[5:2]>
我寻找时尚服装之路只能到此为止了吗……<unk[5:2]>
<unk[3:0:264]>不，要是在这里撒手，
时尚就要衰亡了！<unk[5:0]>
我是不会放弃的！
rows.TWzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>雖然不能大肆張揚……<unk[5:0]>但聽說這<Color=red>山嶺深處的

而且聽利特族所說，
池塘的洞窟只有一個，就在<Color=red>北側<Color=white>……
<unk[3:0:10]><Size=100>但是……<unk[5:1]><Color=red>烏克池塘<Color=white>所在的位置別說是道路了，
連羊腸小徑都沒有，相當險峻……
而且池塘周圍還全都是斷崖絕壁……<unk[5:2]>
看來穿著時髦服裝，最多只能到這裡了嗎……<unk[5:2]>
<unk[3:0:264]>不行！在這裡放棄的話，
我就不配繼續追求時髦了！<unk[5:0]>
我絕對不會放棄！

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Some say that the legendary bandit <Color=red>Misko<Color=white>
actually INVENTED fashion.<PageBreak>And some of their very favorite clothes
are supposed to be hidden in <Color=red>a cave at
Lake Kilsie<Color=white> to the <Color=red>northwest<Color=white>!<unk[5:1]>
I know that the cave is on the <Color=red>north side<Color=white>
of the lake, but it isn't easy to get there.
No roads, no trails, not even a path!<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:11]>But if I give up now...<unk[5:1]>I might fall from
the cutting edge of fashion! If there's
no path, I'll just make my own!

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>I'd never say a word against clothes
this chic. <unk[5:1]>But between you and me...<unk[5:1]>
this outfit is really cold.
My wardrobe is practically crying out for
Misko's <Color=red>favorite cold-weather clothes<Color=white>!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:9]>The only way to stop this shivering is to
go to <Color=red>Lake Kilsie Cave<Color=white> and claim that
iconic garb for myself.
The cave's tucked away in <Color=red>Dronoc's Pass<Color=white>
up <Color=red>north<Color=white>, surrounded by steep cliffs.<PageBreak>But if I think about the obstacles, I'll stop
moving. And if I stop moving, I'll freeze!

rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>此话不可到处声张，其实<Color=red>这山顶深处的
乌克池塘的洞窟<Color=white>里藏着<Color=red>拉姆达的宝物<Color=white>……

只有<Color=red>北侧<Color=white>的洞窟是在池塘里的…<Size=100>
<unk[3:0:10]>话虽如此……<Color=red><unk[5:1]>乌克池塘<Color=white>所在之处相当危险，
不仅没有道路，连野兽踏出的小道也找不到……
池塘周围更是断崖绝壁环绕……

只穿一件时尚的服装前往，实在让我心中不安。

我还是去一趟<Color=red>报社<Color=white>，
为旅途好好准备一番为妙……

<Color=red>Misko's treasure<Color=white> is hidden in <Color=red>Lake Kilsie Cave inside

precipices... I shudder for these stylish
threads just thinking about it.
Maybe I should stop by the <Color=red>newspaper
company<Color=white> to get some more info and prep
myself for the journey.

也知道那地方的洞窟只有一個，就在<Color=red>池塘北邊<Color=white>……<unk[5:0]>
但是實在找不到路過去啊……

<unk[3:0:10]>只穿著一件時髦服裝有點不安，

還是去一趟<Color=red>報社<Color=white>，
做好更萬全的旅行準備吧……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>オシャレの<Ruby={4:6}がんそ>元祖といわれてる
<Ruby={4:8}とうぞく>盗賊<Color=red>ラムダ<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:8}あいよう>愛用した<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服が
<Color=red><Ruby={4:8}ほくせい>北西<Color=white>にある <Color=red>ウッコ<Ruby={2:4}いけ>池の<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟<Color=white>にあるらしい<unk[5:0]>
ってとこまでは <Ruby={2:4}つか>掴んでるんだけどなぁ…
しかも <Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟は<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}いけ>池の<Ruby={4:8}きたがわ>北側<Color=white>にしかないってことも
わかってるのに<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}みち>道がないとは…
<unk[3:0:10]><Ruby={4:6}さすが>流石にオシャレ<Ruby={6:10}ぎいちまい>着一枚じゃ <Ruby={4:6}ふあん>不安だし

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Up <Color=red>northwest <Color=white>at <Color=red>Lake Kilsie<Color=white>, <Color=red>there's a
cave <Color=white>that holds an amazing treasure...<PageBreak>a piece of clothing that once belonged to
the inventor of fashion—<Color=red><unk[5:0]>Misko <Color=white>the bandit!<PageBreak>I know roughly where it is—on the <Color=red>north
side<Color=white> of the lake—but I can't figure out
how to get there.
<unk[5:0]>There's not a road to be seen around
those parts.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:10]>Just imagine the toll roughing it would
take on my clothes...<PageBreak>Hm, yeah, I'm not doing this without a
plan. Maybe the <Color=red>newspaper company<Color=white>
could help me figure one out.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>大盗<Color=red>拉姆达<Color=white>在<Color=red>极寒之地冒险时<Color=white>仰仗的
流传至今的传说中的服装……
据说它就被匿藏在
这片<Color=red>海布拉地区<Color=white>。

<unk[3:0:7]>Legendary clothing from <Color=red>Misko's<Color=white> <Color=red>icy-clime

<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>I can't say this too loudly, but I heard one of the

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>They say the bandit <Color=red>Misko<Color=white> hid some of
their legendary clothing in <Color=red>Hebra<Color=white>...<PageBreak>Those clothes are supposed to a big help
for adventuring in the biting cold.<PageBreak><Size=80><unk[3:0:268]>They ALSO say that one of those pieces is hidden in
<Color=red>Lake Kilsie Cave <Color=white>to the <Color=red>northwest<Color=white>...<PageBreak><Size=100><unk[3:0:263]>Treasure is always finders keepers.<Size=80><Size=100><unk[5:1]>
Don't sweat it if you get there before
me, superstar!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>但是，还没去<Color=red>乌克池塘<Color=white>呢，
我就已经把准备好的料理都吃光了……
那地方可不是单穿一件这样的时尚服装
就能轻松抵达的。
我得先在报社休息一下，
做足准备才行。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:10]>但是還沒前往<Color=red>烏克池塘<Color=white>，
事先準備的料理就已經全部吃完了……
那可不是個讓人只穿著一件時髦服裝
就能自由前往的地方。
看來得先去報社休息，
做好萬全的準備。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:10]>だが <Color=red>ウッコ<Ruby={2:4}いけ>池<Color=white>に<Ruby={2:2}い>行く<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前に

まずは <Ruby={6:12}しんぶんしゃ>新聞社で<Ruby={2:4}やす>休ませてもらって
<Ruby={4:6}したく>支度しねぇとな
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]>I got a little problem here though... I, uh,
kinda ate all the food I whipped up for the
journey to <Color=red>Lake Kilsie<Color=white>.
Misko didn't exactly choose a hiding
spot that was easily accessible for the
fashionably minded.<PageBreak>Maybe I should swing by the newspaper
company to rest and stock up real quick.

rows.CNzh: 目标是拉姆达的宝物！
rows.TWzh: 一定要取得拉姆達的寶物！
rows.JPja: <Ruby={4:4}めざ>目指すはラムダのお<Ruby={2:6}たから>宝！
rows.USen: Misko's outfit, here I come.

rows.CNzh: 唔，果然不行吗……
rows.TWzh: 可惡，還是不行嗎……
rows.JPja: くっ ダメか…
rows.USen: Ngh, I can't...

rows.CNzh: 确实……好冷……
rows.TWzh: 真的……好冷啊……
rows.JPja: やっぱり…<Ruby={2:4}さむ>寒いな…
rows.USen: It's cold...what a surprise.

rows.CNzh: 开始下雨了啊！
rows.TWzh: 開始下雨了啊！
rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}ふ>降ってきたか！
rows.USen: It's really coming down!

rows.CNzh: ……一定要到达那里！
rows.TWzh: ……我一定要抵達那裡！
rows.JPja: …たどり<Ruby={2:2}つ>着いてみせる！
rows.USen: I can reach it. I know I can!

rows.CNzh: 总之先去报社……
rows.TWzh: 總之先去一趟報社……
rows.JPja: とりあえず<Ruby={6:12}しんぶんしゃ>新聞社へ…
rows.USen: Could the news folks help?

rows.CNzh: 怎么就没忍住给吃了呢……
rows.TWzh: 為什麼會吃掉啊……
rows.JPja: なんで<Ruby={2:2}く>食っちまうかなぁ…
rows.USen: Why did I eat it all?
